name: Yunying
description: Phone-bound运营编排工具：skill 驱动的后台任务、替换、状态与日志。

defaultAccountId.description: Default phone account to use when calls omit accountId.

defaultMode.description: Default phone runtime mode for stage execution.

defaultWaitTimeoutMs.description: Default wait timeout for each phone stage.

autoResumeEnabled.description: Automatically resume recoverable interrupted jobs and stale workers.

autoResumeDelayMs.description: Base backoff delay before a recoverable worker resumes.

autoResumeMaxDelayMs.description: Maximum backoff delay between automatic resume attempts.

autoResumeMaxAttempts.description: Maximum automatic resume attempts before the worker pauses.

supervisorPollMs.description: How often the background supervisor scans for due workers.

maxLogEntries.description: Default max log entries returned by logs/status.
